item.title: This is 100% flat farmland. The photographer took this photo from the plane window while over eastern Colorado. The snow drifts and snow melt on the crops had created an illusion of endless cubism.
item.description: credit user hoerr on reddit https://www.reddit.com/user/hoerr

item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: I scared myself there for a minute.....
item.dc:creator: Shyamallama

item.title: NOT GOING TO PRISON!!
item.description: Yesterday I told you all that I was being sentenced today. That the police wanted 2 years. That I was charged with possession of a large amount of prescription drugs I shouldn't have. Well I have been sentenced. 1 years prison suspended with 2 years probation. £1000 fine. I also am going to be monitored for 7 years due to the large amount and have to attend a lot of rehabilitation courses but I'm not I'm prison. I feel so happy and close to having a happy break down. Thank you all, the last 24hrs have been hell but your kind words kept me going. I'm planning to hopefully do 4 UK free pizza day delivery when I get paid because I want to pay this happiness forward.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: It’s been only three days, and no immigrant is safe regardless of documentation
item.dc:creator: bananapeel11

item.title: Finely Tuned Friday MEME DUMP To Make You Exhale Through Your Nostrils #212
item.description:
1. One of the biggest L takes I've ever heard (1/2)
2. One of the biggest L takes I've ever heard (2/2)
3. To be fair to my man, that body is holy
4. When Skynet takes over a Turkish kebab shop
5. "Oh shit, she ded, okay byeeeee..."
6. Dad uses this April Fool's Day to prank his daughters into believing school had just reopened
7
8. Wait...
9.
10
11. Johnny Carson trolling Myrtle Young the world renown potato chip collector.
12. PEAR PRESSURE!
13. The other day this guy on our team had 0 kills and 3 deaths and he was like "EZ" at the end of the match...
14. Good to see that a company is finally listening to its customers!
15. It's so great to see an indie game succeed! Balatro just sold 5 million copies and it was made by just one guy. I find the story inspiring and in spirit of his message I would like to ask you to check out (and maybe wishlist) the indie game I'm currently working on, called: Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P.S. Thank you for your support, it means the world to me and my brother! Game coming soon.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: London man finds a mysterious egg on walk, incubates it ...
item.description:
Irish author Riyadh Khalaf was out walking in Devon, England, when he came upon an egg. "We just found what we think is a duck egg," Riyadh says in a video showing the milky white egg sitting in a pile of dirt. "Just sitting here on its own. No nest. No other eggs."
Thinking there was no way it was going to survive on its own, Riyadh put the egg in a paper cup cushioned with a napkin and took it home to London, which entailed two car rides, a hotel stay, a train ride, a tube ride, and a bus ride. He said he used to breed chickens and pigeons, so he had some experience with birds. Knowing the egg could survive for a while in a dormant state, he ordered an incubator on Amazon, and the journey to see if the egg was viable began.
#3 Compilation Video - Complete single original ones at: https://www.instagram.com/riyadhk/
#4 Ducky.
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Stupid timeline
item.description: My dad is convinced Biden was bad, Trump will bring good. Despite all the shit he's done already. "How can 70 million voters be wrong?" Well, dad, 44 mlion voted for Hitler so definitely a possibility. Edit: Thanks for the responses. I appreciate the various perspectives and experiences. I tried to respond to everyone, but theres just too many.

item.title: Martian Wind!!!
item.description: There is no wind here!!! Specifically, there is no wind here on Earth moving them. Rather, each stalk is connected to a mechanical device receiving data from the wind sensors on NASA'S perseverence rover - transmitting this signal from Mars. What you're witnessing, is the movement of dead vegetation on earth, swaying to the rhythms of Martian wind. We certainly have a seemingly endless list of things to complain about; often rendering our view of existence in pessimistic terms. But in the final analysis, We are a complicated social primate also capable of incredible acts of beauty -like the conception of this novel installation by @davidbowenart @nasa

Donald Trump calls this "merit based hiring" when in reality, he ended the EO that encouraged merit based hiring.

item.description:
Little late post but so important!
Make America grift again
Except the bro CEOs
There’s still hope.
Eggs are free when the shelf is empty.
They are
Imagine if Bernie looked like Luigi with all his political knowledge. He’d definitely get elected!
Fuck indeed
Don’t let the bastards silence you either!

item.title: It's a good start
item.description: I understand when someone's circumstances change and they can no longer afford their pet, but so many animals are just abandoned here (UK). You can give up a pet to a charity with no shame or blame but some just get dumped :( https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/ceq9g31v88ro.amp

item.title: A frozen Florida dump for you all
item.description:
Yeah I made fun of the snow - day 3 of nothing being open
This guy gets it
And I’ve hit at least three of you this week
I love that clearly people have to know the right answer? They’re just screwing with him right?
I don’t know why it’s blurred out - so to the two angry imgurians who always point it out - I’m sorry - I didn’t relook the meme up for you - forgive me . But here - you can put anything there it doesn’t have to be sexy - could be fuck , just imagine it that way and be happy
Ya my friends got back into magic - this is a real thing
Every damn day
Current state of Florida
I hate them so much - so so much. Like I know butt rock is getting popular again , please , just don’t .
A better band for your consideration
I forgot to redownload my get in the comments on my new phone - so you get a frozen ass I had to put a blanket on picture. Your welcome Have a goodnight you guys !

item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social/post/3lghaf2hoyk2b Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes and award, my dudes. The only follow up question I have when someone says we're fighting Nazis is, who is keeping track of the Nazi scalps we collect?

item.title: Ding Dong
item.description: The police found her body yesterday afternoon. All I have done since is drink and cry. And worst of all I feel relieved. She was so deeply involved in some horrible things that happened to me as a child but she is still a human being and I feel awful for her. And I need to keep reminding myself she is dead. I’ve already text her twice lol
item.dc:creator: HandsFaceLiminalspace
